overview.minides: India's most futuristic electric SUV — fighter-jet cockpit, 500+ km real-world range, Level 2 ADAS, and a 175 kW fast charge in 20 minutes.
overview.description: Launched on 26 November 2024, the Mahindra BE 6 is the brand's first born-electric SUV coupe built on the INGLO platform. Available in 5 variants (Pack One to Pack Three) across two battery packs — 59 kWh (228 hp) and 79 kWh (286 hp) — all with RWD. The 79 kWh Pack Three claims 683 km ARAI range. Key features include dual 12.3-inch screens, an AR HUD, panoramic glass roof, Level 2 ADAS, and 16-speaker Harman Kardon audio on the top variant. Charging from 20–80% takes just 20 minutes on a 175 kW DC fast charger. The BE 6 also spawned special editions: the Batman Edition (999 units, ₹27.79 lakh) and the Formula E Edition (FE2 at ₹23.69 lakh, FE3 at ₹24.49 lakh) with circular LED headlamps and Formula E racing aesthetics.

suspension.additionalTech: Electronically controlled dampers on Pack Three

brakes.front: Ventilated disc with regenerative braking integration

chargingSpecs.dcFastCharging: 175 kW DC (20–80% in 20 minutes on 79 kWh)
chargingSpecs.batteryWarranty: Lifetime warranty (first owner) / 10 years or 2,00,000 km (subsequent owners)

variants.name: Pack Three
keyFeatures: 286 hp | 0–100 in 6.7 sec | 202 km/h top speed
175 kW DC Fast Charge — 20–80% in 20 Minutes
